texto: PatienceA word so difficult to pronounce because it is so difficult to wait or to be patient. But no matter how someone is behaving, appreciate the grace you have for God to give you people that will build that character in you!! It isn't easy but for the Christ like being, it is joy overwhelming. Thank and praise God for every situations that require you to be patient. God bless you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jean Faustin Louembe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “PatienceA word so difficult to pronounce because it is so difficult to wait or to be patient. But…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, patience, difficult pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: A life well lived is better than too many quotesSometimes we are too fast, we want to shoot at people with our knowledge of the Bible. We don't really need to open our mouth much! Like the bible says: we are suppose to be those living epistles read of all men. Our actions talk more than our religious behaviour. Let's be more showing Christ than showing our knowledge about the Word. God bless you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jean Faustin Louembe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “A life well lived is better than too many quotesSometimes we are too fast, we want to shoot at pe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, living, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: patience is a virtueSometimes in our different relations, there are challenges that lead to misunderstanding and quarrel. But it will take a very good substance, that will sustain and make everything enjoyable. It is patience, a very important virtue. When you are down, facing a situation that eat you up, don't rush into conclusion but just be patient. God bless you.

texto: praise Him in whatever stormsHe is the one who gives and who takes back. That's why you are what you are by His amazing grace. The storms of your life are just there to strengthen you and to give you more insights of what He wants to teach you. Never give up beloved one, The Lord Jesus-Christ is ever present for you. Victorious people never give up, remember He never gave up on you, He went till Calvary for your sake and He was proud to die for you and I. That's why you should really give yourself away to Him who loves you to the deepest of your soul! Shalom God bless you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jean Faustin Louembe sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “praise Him in whatever stormsHe is the one who gives and who takes back. That's why you are what …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, praise, never, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
